title: Youth Justice Board Register of Board members’ interests
body: "The purpose of this list is to meet the requirements of:   Non-Executive Board Member declaration of interests process - GOV.UK section 6.4.3 of the Government Financial Reporting Manual 2023 to 2024 paragraph 4.15 of the Corporate governance in central departments: code of good practice   Categories include:   Paid employment / Consultancy Directorships Contract with YJB Shareholding relating to YJB Business Unpaid office in Charitable/other body Family Member related interests Other public appointments  "
